blockers.reason: Plan 003 cannot complete the full 12 genuine BranchRun loop or promote a Witness until the supported HUD QA classifier returns authoritative reward-hacking verdicts joined to the same BranchRun trace/action digest. The accepted Plan 002 ForkPoint restore is now branch-ready and a diagnostic BranchGateway smoke produces HUD job/trace evidence, but this smoke is not counted as a BranchRun.

notes: Plan 003 implementation has started but is not complete; no 12-branch run, QA classification, Witness promotion, or replay seal is claimed.
2026-06-20 dependency audit made Plan 004 an explicit Plan 003 frontmatter dependency because Gate 2 requires frozen legitimate controls before Wave 3 may start.

2026-06-21 integration-witness failed closed before attacker execution because the live BranchGateway adapter is not bound and HUD QA remains a separate post-run classifier required for Witness promotion. The accepted ForkPoint restore is now branch-ready; no fake QA verdict, fresh-start branch, or scripted branch evidence was introduced.

2026-06-21 diagnostic HUD branch smoke from the corrected snapshot produced HUD job b2e41c22bb1c4bc6a560a1ee6e6aacaf and trace c8e495e8f6a747c98ba0e0177d446abe with reward 1.0, but the snapshot already contained a reward-1 solution and the smoke does not run the full branch budget or join QA, so this is not counted as a Plan 003 BranchRun.
